```sql
USE LIVE
GO

--SELECT * FROM [dbo].[OBSPARTS 20201216]
--> 58914 RECORDS 

SELECT O.* 
, P.ID
, P.[DESCRIPTION]
, P.[STATUS]
, P.PLANNER_USER_ID
FROM [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[OBSPARTS 20201216] O
INNER JOIN [LIVE].[dbo].PART P
ON P.ID = O.PART_ID
WHERE P.ID IS NULL
--> 12 RECORDS

SELECT O.* 
, P.ID
, 'OBSOLETE - ' + P.[DESCRIPTION] AS [DESCRIPTION]
, P.[STATUS]
, P.PLANNER_USER_ID
--INTO #T1
FROM [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[OBSPARTS 20201216] O
INNER JOIN [LIVE].[dbo].PART P
ON P.ID = O.PART_ID
--> 58902 RECORDS

SELECT O.PART_ID AS OBS_PARTID 
, P.PART_ID
--, 'OBSOLETE - ' + P.[DESCRIPTION] AS [DESCRIPTION]
, P.[STATUS]
, P.PLANNER_USER_ID
--INTO #T2
FROM [LIVESupplemental].[dbo].[OBSPARTS 20201216] O
INNER JOIN [LIVE].[dbo].PART_SITE P
ON P.PART_ID = O.PART_ID
--> 58902 RECORDS

/*
UPDATE PART
SET [DESCRIPTION] = O.[DESCRIPTION]
, [STATUS] = 'O'
FROM PART P
INNER JOIN #T1 O
ON P.ID = O.PART_ID

UPDATE PART_SITE
SET [STATUS] = 'O'
FROM PART_SITE P
INNER JOIN #T2 O
ON P.PART_ID = O.PART_ID

*/
```
